name: foodlens_expanded_taxonomy_v1
description: Conservative expanded taxonomy built from Food-101 plus audited public Kaggle food datasets. FoodX-251 remains preferred for the long-term expansion, but it requires Kaggle competition access first.

exclude_raw_labels.aloo_matar: Only 97 images in the audited public dataset; hold until more examples are available.

known_access_blockers.ifood-2019-fgvc6: FoodX-251 is visible but not downloadable until the Kaggle account enters the community competition.
